creator: aw1@stade.co.uk
text:
The wwwoffle port is missing a couple of files, and makes
	incorrect assumptions about the permissions on one file.

	The result is that the port fails to install.

Fix: Apply the following diffs.

	Changed files:
		Makefile

	New files
		files/wwwoffled.sh
		pkg/INSTALL
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/www/wwwoffle; make install
